word: G891 - ἄχρι - áchri - akh'-ree - As far as

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: As far as
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
even to; until, to the time that
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Akin to G206 (through the idea of a terminus); (of time) until or (of place) up to: - as far as, for, in (-to), till, (even, un-) to, until, while. Compare G3360.
